de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.mergerule.predicateabstraction

Class AbstractDomainElemChoice

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.mergerule.predicateabstraction.AbstractDomainElemChoice

  • public class AbstractDomainElemChoice
extends java.lang.Object
    Model class for the manual choice of an abstract domain element by the user.
